steps.title: Find zeros of the numerator
steps.content: A fraction equals zero when its numerator is zero (and denominator is non-zero). The numerator $(x-7)(x-8) = 0$ gives $x = 7$ or $x = 8$. Check: $7 - 3 = 4 \neq 0$ and $8 - 3 = 5 \neq 0$, so both solutions are valid.

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content: The sum is $7 + 8 = 15$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
